service.name: OpenStreetMap Overpass API
service.description_for_ai: Query OpenStreetMap data using Overpass QL. Find any geographic features: restaurants, hospitals, bus stops, parks, buildings, roads. Most detailed free map data. No API key needed.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Query OSM data for geographic features near coordinates or in bounding box. Find any type of place: restaurants, hospitals, schools, ATMs, parks.

agent_hints.query_template: [out:json];node[KEY=VALUE](around:RADIUS_M,LAT,LON);out body; — finds nodes with tag near point
agent_hints.common_amenities: restaurant, cafe, hospital, pharmacy, school, bank, atm, parking, fuel, supermarket, bus_stop
agent_hints.radius: around:500 = 500 meters. Use larger radius for sparse areas.
agent_hints.slow: Complex queries can take 30+ seconds. Add timeout: [out:json][timeout:60]
